title: draba alpina subsp. brachycarpa
intro: Draba alpina subsp. brachycarpa, also known as Brachycarpaea alpina, is a subspecies of flowering plant in the genus Draba, commonly found in mountainous regions. The plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. Its health benefits include reducing inflammation, improving wound healing, and exhibiting antimicrobial activity. The herbal preparations of Draba alpina subsp. brachycarpa can be found in the form of extracts, tinctures, and infusions, which are often used to treat various health conditions.
